scope: Binance EN/global rejected captures (permanent audit archive)
note: Permanent do-not-reuse archive. 'legacy: true' marks captures with no current active job (rejected-only history). QA grep must ensure no candidatePath here appears in built HTML.

rejected.reason: Page showed 'An Error Occurred' on the mobile app page.
rejected.notes: Recapture clean via job binance_mobile_app_clean_en_global. Slot removed from contextualScreenshotSlots.

rejected.reason: Loading/unfinished Identification screen — page did not fully load at capture time.
rejected.notes: Authenticated recapture required via job binance_kyc_overview_clean_en_global (tier badges only; crop PII).

rejected.reason: Showed CNY market (Chinese locale/currency); global page targets USD/USDT or neutral audience.
rejected.notes: Recapture USD/USDT via job binance_p2p_direction_usd_usdt_en_global using capture-public-p2p-screenshot.mjs. URL bar must be hidden/cropped.

rejected.reason: Generic 100 USD sign-up reward from plain /register URL without CBW referral parameter — not the CBW 19,800 USDT offer.
rejected.notes: Legacy — superseded by registration_demo_state (CBW referral). Do not use as partner bonus proof.

rejected.reason: Generic referral program page showing 100/1,000 USD tier offers — not the CBW 19,800 USDT partner offer.
rejected.notes: Legacy — superseded by bonus_referral_landing (19,800 USDT). Do not use as partner bonus proof.

rejected.reason: Futures interface excluded from primary gallery — spot screenshot provides equivalent trading view.
rejected.notes: Legacy/archived. Recapture with annotation only if futures-specific content warrants inclusion.

rejected.reason: Security overview capture rejected — risk of implying guaranteed safety; superseded by sourced PoR/SAFU claim wording.
rejected.notes: Legacy/policy rejection. Security/SAFU is handled via cautious wording on claim binance_security_safu, not a 'safety' screenshot.

rejected.reason: Deposit methods capture not approved — risk of exposing payment account details; no approved claim.
rejected.notes: Legacy/policy rejection. Only method SELECTION (no entered details) may be captured via card_buy_methods job, and only after a claim exists.

rejected.reason: Withdrawal addresses are forbidden content — never captured under any approval.
rejected.notes: Maps to forbidden job binance_withdrawal_addresses_en_global. Absolute prohibition (AUTHENTICATED_SCREENSHOT_CAPTURE_FLOW §2).
